events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen guitarist Brian May, known for his iconic sound and songwriting, celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Seventy-nine years young and still rocking! Wishing a very happy birthday to the legendary Queen guitarist, Brian May. What's your favourite May riff?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman Sir Mick Jagger, famous for his electrifying stage presence and enduring rock 'n' roll career, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Rock Icon
angles.copy: Still got the moves like Jagger at 83! Happy birthday to the legendary Rolling Stones frontman, Mick Jagger. What's your go-to Stones track?

events.title: MTV launched (1981)
events.blurb: Music Television, MTV, launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its very first music video.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: Forty-five years ago today, MTV changed music forever by launching with 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. The irony isn't lost on us, but what was your favourite music video from the early days?

events.title: Oasis released Definitely Maybe (1994)
events.blurb: Oasis released their debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, which quickly became a Britpop defining record.

angles.name: Britpop Classic
angles.copy: Thirty-two years since Oasis unleashed 'Definitely Maybe' on the world. What's the standout track from their seminal debut that still gets you going?

events.title: Woodstock Festival took place (1969)
events.blurb: The iconic Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in music history, took place from August 15-18, 1969, in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago, a generation gathered for '3 Days of Peace & Music' at Woodstock. What's the one performance you wish you'd witnessed live?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the passing of the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who would have been 91. He was born on January 8, 1935, and died on August 16, 1977.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Remembering the one and only King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, today. His legacy continues to inspire generations. What's your favourite Elvis track?

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's death
events.blurb: Today marks 30 years since the tragic passing of influential rapper Tupac Shakur, who would have been 55. He was born on June 16, 1971, and died on September 13, 1996, in Las Vegas.

angles.name: Tupac's Legacy
angles.copy: Thirty years on, the impact of Tupac Shakur is still felt across music and culture. Remembering a true icon today. What's your most powerful Tupac lyric?

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's death
events.blurb: Today marks the anniversary of the death of legendary guitarist Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 84. He was born on November 27, 1942, and died on September 18, 1970.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled genius of Jimi Hendrix today. His revolutionary guitar work continues to inspire. What's your favourite Hendrix track?

events.title: The Beatles released Abbey Road (1969)
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic album 'Abbey Road', featuring its famous zebra crossing cover, was released in the UK on September 26, 1969.

angles.name: Iconic Album
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago today, The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover is still one of the most recognisable in history. What's your favourite track from it?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Chrissie Hynde, the distinctive voice and frontwoman of The Pretenders, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Pretenders Icon
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the legendary Chrissie Hynde! Her unique style and powerful vocals have made The Pretenders a timeless band. What's your favourite Pretenders hit?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and Beady Eye frontman Liam Gallagher, known for his distinctive vocal style and charismatic stage presence, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Star
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! The voice of a generation and still a true rock 'n' roll star. What's your favourite Liam moment?

events.title: John Lennon released Imagine (1971)
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic anthem 'Imagine' was released as a single in October 1971, becoming one of his most celebrated solo works.

angles.name: Peace Anthem
angles.copy: Fifty-five years since John Lennon released the timeless message of 'Imagine'. Its call for peace and unity resonates just as strongly today. What does this song mean to you?

events.title: Apple released the first iPod (2001)
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first iPod on October 23, 2001, and it became available on November 10, 2001, revolutionising portable music.

angles.name: Music in Your Pocket
angles.copy: Twenty-five years ago, the first iPod changed how we listened to music forever, putting '1,000 songs in your pocket'. What was the first album you loaded onto yours?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated as James Bond Day, marking the anniversary of the world premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: 007 Day
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! From iconic gadgets to unforgettable theme songs, 007 has it all. Who's your favourite Bond, and what's the ultimate Bond theme?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Legendary Beatles co-founder and peace activist John Lennon would have been 86 today. He was born on October 9, 1940, and tragically died in 1980.

angles.name: Lennon's Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday. His music and message of peace continue to inspire the world. What's your favourite Lennon lyric?

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: British comedy icon John Cleese, known for his work with Monty Python and Fawlty Towers, celebrates his 87th birthday.

angles.name: Comedy Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 87th birthday to the brilliant John Cleese! From Monty Python to Fawlty Towers, his comedic genius is unparalleled. What's your favourite John Cleese moment?
